rationale: For a Polish resident, the US-Iran deal announcement continues to push oil prices down (mild positive for energy costs), while Russian strikes in Ukraine remain ongoing background — no qualitative change this cycle.

top_events.title: Oil prices slide after US-Iran deal announced
top_events.summary: Falling oil prices offer mild relief on energy and fuel costs for Polish consumers, but the deal is still unsigned — continuation of last cycle's dynamic with no new qualitative leap.

top_events.title: Russian strikes kill nine in Ukraine and damage historic cathedral
top_events.summary: War continues with confirmed civilian casualties and infrastructure damage in Ukraine — no qualitative escalation relative to established baseline for Poland.

top_events.title: UK and Japan agree £18bn investment deal
top_events.summary: A large bilateral investment deal between UK and Japan has limited direct impact on Poland but signals continued Western economic alignment post-Brexit — minor background note.
